units.content: system of claim 21 further comprises a loop-gain analyzer
loop-gain analyzer identifies cyclic subgraphs from a directed graph induced by storage records and structured pointers
each cyclic subgraph comprises at least one record with source tag carrying third predetermined value
each cyclic subgraph comprises at least one record with source tag carrying one of first two predetermined values
loop-gain analyzer computes spectral-radius metric from linearization of subgraph dynamics near current state for each cyclic subgraph
spectral-radius metric is evaluated against a predetermined threshold
loop-gain analyzer emits typed cycle annotation stored in append-only event log for each subgraph whose spectral-radius metric meets or exceeds threshold
